Product Description:
Embrace the chill of winter sports with the X-BIONIC® INVENT FX NECKWARMER. This high-performance accessory is designed to keep you warm, comfortable, and focused on the thrill of the slopes. 

The 3D Bionic Sphere® System with ThermoSyphon® technology is a marvel of modern design, maintaining an optimal body temperature for peak performance. It provides insulation when you're cold and vents heat when your body temperature rises, ensuring you stay comfortable no matter how intense your activity. 

The additional 3D Bionic Sphere® at the back of the neck further enhances temperature regulation, absorbing sweat and facilitating its evaporation. This ensures a dry and comfortable experience, letting you focus on the exhilaration of the ride. 

The Sweat Strap feature is designed to catch and absorb any excess sweat, preventing it from dripping into your eyes and disrupting your vision. Meanwhile, the Retina technology provides superior warmth-to-weight ratio, making the neckwarmer incredibly light and comfortable to wear. 

Our accessories collection follows a consistent logic for warming and ventilation zones, ensuring optimal body temperature regulation. Complemented by accessories tailored to your needs, you'll experience enhanced comfort, improved performance, and increased energy levels during physical activities. 

The X-BIONIC® INVENT FX NECKWARMER is more than just a winter accessory. It's a companion that enhances your winter sports experience, keeping you warm, dry, and focused on the thrill of the slopes.
